app.title: Arabic Teaching Quality Platform for Non-Native Speakers

home.title: Arabic Quality Platform
home.subtitle: A comprehensive platform that automates the full evaluation cycle — from institution registration to the issuance of an official report, with confidence and transparency.

getStarted.d: Quick guide to using the platform

register.title: Register a new institution
register.subtitle: Fill in the form — your request will be reviewed by the platform admin
register.error: An error occurred, please try again later

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Overview of your account and activity
dashboard.help_desc: Contact the platform admin or check the documentation for detailed guidance.

profile.title: My profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your personal info and account preferences
profile.identity_desc: Update your name and phone — email is bound to your account
profile.email_locked: Email cannot be modified — it is bound to your Keycloak account
profile.password_desc: Change your password securely via an encrypted email
profile.mfa_desc: Add an extra layer of security with an authenticator app
profile.signout_all_desc: End the current session on all devices
profile.privacy_desc: Your data is encrypted and stored securely
profile.privacy_note: Passwords and sessions are fully managed by Keycloak. Our platform never stores raw passwords.

requests.title: My requests
requests.subtitle: Track all evaluation requests you submitted

new_request.title: New evaluation request
new_request.subtitle: Pick categories and answer questions
new_request.desc: Dynamic form to submit a new evaluation request. Select categories, answer questions, and attach required documents.

request_detail.title: Request details
request_detail.subtitle: Summary, status and final result
request_detail.desc: View all request details: answers, attachments, evaluator notes, status, and final result.
request_detail.it1: View answers and attachments per category

inbox.title: Submitted requests
inbox.subtitle: Requests assigned to you for review
inbox.desc: Inbox for evaluation team — all assigned requests with filters.

review.title: Review request
review.subtitle: Answers, attachments and decision
review.desc: Comprehensive review interface to browse answers, adjust ratings, add notes, and issue decisions.
review.it1: View answers and attachments in viewer

dashboard.title: Admin dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Live overview of registration requests and platform actions
dashboard.pending_subtitle: Newest institutions waiting for your review

required_docs.title: Required documents
required_docs.empty: No required documents configured for this category yet.

shell.title: Admin Panel
shell.subtitle: Full platform administration — users, categories, questions, reports

users.title: User management
users.subtitle: Add, edit, deactivate accounts
users.create_hint: An email will be sent automatically to set up the password.

questions.title: Questions
questions.subtitle: Bind questions to categories and manage them
questions.question: Question
questions.it1: Create new questions and link to categories
questions.it2: Toggle if answer requires an attachment

values.title: Values & scores
values.subtitle: A/B/C/D values and numeric scores
values.it1: Edit value labels (Fully compliant, Largely compliant, …)
values.it2: Tune numeric score for each value
values.it4: Activate / deactivate value without losing history

audit.title: Audit log
audit.subtitle: Trace every system action
audit.aop_note: AOP infrastructure is active and logs every sensitive operation. The visualization UI is coming in Sprint 7.
audit.it1: Timeline of all operations (create, update, delete, login)
audit.it2: Advanced filtering by user, type, date
audit.it3: Export logs in multiple formats (JSON / CSV)
audit.it4: Link events to trace a specific request
